_description: Temporal coverage of remote-sensing and reanalysis data sources. Events before a source's start date are not_applicable, not missing. This file is the single source of truth for validate_data_readiness.py.

mrms.note: MRMS v12 operational from 2012. Pre-2012 events have no MRMS coverage.

hrrr.note: HRRR v1 operational Sep 2014. Extended back to 2013 in some archives but not reliably. Pre-2014 events have no HRRR coverage.

gpm_imerg.full_name: NASA GPM IMERG Final Run V07
gpm_imerg.note: IMERG v07 retrospectively processed back to Jun 2000 using TRMM-era calibration. All s035 events are within coverage.

smap.full_name: NASA SMAP L3 Soil Moisture V008
smap.note: SMAP launched Mar 2015. Pre-2015 events have no SMAP coverage.

tides.note: Individual station records vary. Coverage assumed for all s035 events near coastal gauges. Inland events marked not_applicable by event type, not by date.

hurdat2.note: Covers all Atlantic tropical/subtropical cyclones. Not applicable to non-tropical events (e.g., atmospheric rivers).

hwm.full_name: USGS Short-Term Network / High Water Marks
hwm.note: STN/FEV event-specific. Coverage depends on USGS deployment decisions per event. May be source_empty even within temporal range.

openfema.note: NFIP claims database. Coverage depends on DR declaration. All s035 DRs are within range.

_statuses.available: Source covers this event date; fetch expected to succeed
_statuses.not_applicable_temporal: Event predates source's operational start; not a gap
_statuses.not_applicable_type: Source does not apply to this event type (e.g., HURDAT2 for AR events)
_statuses.source_empty: Source covers date but returned zero records for this event
